metadata.description: This is a portrait of a person in their 40s, presenting as male, with warm olive skin and subtle fine lines around the eyes. Their face is oval with a defined jawline, and they have short, wavy, salt-and-pepper hair, mostly dark brown with significant graying, styled back from a receding hairline. The eyes are dark brown, almond-shaped, and set slightly wide apart, beneath thick, dark, slightly arched eyebrows. The nose is straight with a rounded tip, and the mouth features medium-full lips curved into a warm smile, revealing white teeth. A neatly trimmed, salt-and-pepper beard and mustache cover the lower face, and the overall appearance suggests a mixed heritage. The person is looking directly at the viewer with a friendly expression, head held straight.
metadata.anchor: Smiling face with salt-and-pepper hair and beard.
